creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
Annotation to this PR:

I've held off on committing a change because it modifies the kernel ABI
for shmctl by changing the layout of ipc_perm.  We already have an
oschmctl(), so maybe we need an ooshmctl().  However, I don't want to risk
breaking pre-compiled applications (such as databases) that may rely on
this call to operate correctly.  As a non-user of SysVSHM, I'm not in a
good position to evaluate whether the base system utilities using ipc_perm
are the only ones that do, or whether third party utilities are likely to.

Robert N M Watson             FreeBSD Core Team, TrustedBSD Project
robert@fledge.watson.org      NAI Labs, Safeport Network Services
